results.definition_en: Made of stuff one can touch.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 物質的、有形的;由可觸物質構成的。
results.example_en: She has many material things to keep.

results.definition_en: Having to do with the care of ill or hurt people.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 醫學的、醫療的;與病傷照護相關的。
results.example_en: She got medical help at once.
results.example_zh_tw: 她立刻接受了醫療照護。

results.definition_en: Having to do with soldiers or war.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 軍事的、軍方的;與士兵或戰爭相關的。
results.example_en: He works at a military base.

results.definition_en: Made by nature, not by people.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 天然的、自然的;由自然形成、非人造。
results.example_en: Honey is a natural sweet food.

results.definition_en: Needed; that one must have.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 必要的、必須的;不可或缺的。
results.example_en: Water is necessary for life.

results.definition_en: Made or got just now; not old.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 新的;剛製成或剛取得、非舊的。
results.example_en: She has a new dress for the party.
results.example_zh_tw: 她穿了件新洋裝去派對。

results.definition_en: Like most others; not strange.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 正常的、一般的;與多數無異、不奇怪的。
results.example_en: It is normal to feel tired after work.
results.example_zh_tw: 下班後感到疲累很正常。

results.definition_en: Not shut; with a way to go in or out.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 開的、開放的;未關閉、可進出的。
results.example_en: The shop is open till nine.

results.definition_en: Of two lines that go the same way and never meet.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 平行的;兩線同向延伸而不相交。
results.example_en: The roads are parallel for a mile.
results.example_zh_tw: 這兩條路平行了一英里。

results.definition_en: Gone by in time; not now.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 過去的;時間已逝、非當下。
results.example_en: Look back on the past with no regret.

results.definition_en: Of the body; or of things one can touch.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 身體的、物質的;與身體或可觸之物相關。
results.example_en: He does physical work every day.

results.definition_en: Having to do with the government and how it is run.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 政治的;與政府治理相關的。
results.example_en: There is a political meeting tonight.

results.definition_en: Having little money or other things needed.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 貧困的、貧窮的;缺乏金錢或必需之物。
results.example_en: The poor man has no home.

results.definition_en: Able to happen or be done.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 可能的;能夠發生或被完成的。
results.example_en: It is possible to learn a new language.
results.example_zh_tw: 學習新語言是有可能的。

results.definition_en: Being here now; or the time now.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 現在的、出席的;當下存在或在場的。
results.example_en: All the students are present today.
results.example_zh_tw: 所有學生今天都出席了。

results.definition_en: For only one person or a few, not for all.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 私人的、私密的;只屬於某人或少數人。
results.example_en: Do not read my private letters.

results.definition_en: Likely to happen or be true.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 可能的、有可能的;發生或成真機率高的。
results.example_en: It is probable that she will come tonight.

results.definition_en: Done in a short time; not slow.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 快速的、迅速的;耗時短、不慢的。
results.example_en: Give me a quick answer, please.

results.definition_en: Making little or no sound.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 安靜的、寂靜的;發聲少或無聲的。
results.example_en: Please be quiet, the baby is asleep.

results.definition_en: Set to do a thing; with no need to wait.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 準備好的;已就緒、無須等待。
results.example_en: I am ready to go.

results.definition_en: Of the colour of blood or fire.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 紅色的;如血液或火焰之色。
results.example_en: The flowers in the garden are red.

results.definition_en: Happening at the same time again and again; or made in the same way.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 規律的、定期的;反覆於同一時間或同方式。
results.example_en: She has a regular walk every morning.

results.definition_en: Having a duty to do or look after a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 負責的、有責任的;承擔義務或管理之責。
results.example_en: She is responsible for the children.

results.definition_en: True or correct; or on the side that is not the left.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 正確的、右邊的;真實無誤或位於非左之側。
results.example_en: Your answer is right.

results.definition_en: In the shape of a circle or a ball.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 圓的、環形的;形如圓圈或球體。
results.example_en: The plate is round and white.
